title: ASAN double free on shrinkToFit
description:
### Describe the bug
Seen here: https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?REF=master&sha=98c52db6cdd525a8319307528c71ef3c4228bc83&name_0=MasterCI&name_1=AST+fuzzer+%28arm_asan%29
### How to reproduce
ON an ASAN build run (may take several times):
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (x Int16) ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (x) ORDER BY x;
INSERT INTO t0 VALUES (1), (2), (1), (3);
SELECT median(3) IGNORE NULLS FROM t0 PREWHERE and(materialize(toNullable(materialize(1))), not(materialize(100) = *)) WHERE not(* <=> isNull(100));
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
=================================================================
==3927199==ERROR: AddressSanitizer: attempting double-free on 0x5210004fed00 in thread T722 (QueryPipelineEx):
#0 0x63f1c002c7ac in realloc (/home/ubuntu/repositories/clickhouse-master/BUILD/bin/clickhouse-asan+0xe8aa7ac) (BuildId: efc5f44f9140d61aa44c2512b4415d93cbb7c155)

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b VARCHAR, c DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'test', 1.5), (2, NULL, 2.5), (3, 'example', NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT * FROM t1;
SELECT a, MEDIAN(c) FROM t1 WHERE b IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a;
SELECT a, COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE c IS NULL GROUP BY a HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
key_bug_features: Double free during shrinkToFit operation in MergeTree
